title: /fill Command Unlimited
description: Allows the fill command to accept multiple arguments for the handling of the block changes
body: This mod allows the /fill command to accept multiple arguments that handle how the blocks change \[outline/hollow/destroy/keep/replace\] **Examples:** `/fill ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ air replace gravel destroy` destroys only gravel as if it were broken by a player `/fill ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ stone keep outline` place a hollow cube without replacing any existing blocks `/fill ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ air replace #minecraft:base_stone_overworld outline destroy` breaks the borders of a cube made of overworld cave blocks Programming by Project8gbDeRam
